overview.title: 90-Day Launch Roadmap: SGA Dental Partners
overview.coreTension: A practice owner making a once-in-a-career $2.4M decision over 6-18 months cannot be launched at the same way as an implant patient booking a consultation in 2-8 weeks.
overview.governingPrinciple: Build the engine before turning the key. Nothing goes live until the measurement infrastructure is proven.
overview.activationOrderPrinciple: Organic before paid. Owned before rented. High-intent before awareness.
launchPhilosophy: Build the engine before turning the key. Weeks 1-2 install tracking, configure automation, QA all assets, and align the team.
Light one fire at a time. Launch week activates channels in a deliberate sequence -- organic before paid, owned before rented, high-intent before awareness.
Optimize before scaling. Weeks 4-12 run the A/B test program, refine based on data, and only increase paid spend on channels that prove unit economics.

milestones.name: Infrastructure complete
milestones.successCriteria: All tracking pixels, UTMs, email automation, and CRM integrations verified

milestones.name: V1 launch complete
milestones.successCriteria: All 5 landing pages live, email sequences active, paid ads running on Google + LinkedIn + Meta, social posting cadence established

milestones.name: First A/B test results
milestones.successCriteria: LP-1 (headline) and AD-1 (hook type) winners declared

milestones.name: First discovery calls from marketing
milestones.successCriteria: Minimum 5 discovery calls booked through marketing-generated leads

milestones.name: Scorecard funnel live
milestones.successCriteria: Partnership Readiness Scorecard deployed with follow-up email sequences

milestones.name: YouTube content series launched
milestones.successCriteria: First 4 videos from content calendar published

milestones.name: Chatbot deployed
milestones.successCriteria: Live on main landing page and patient landing page

milestones.name: 90-day review complete
milestones.successCriteria: Full funnel performance review, A/B test cumulative lift calculated, budget reallocation based on data

successMetrics.metric: Organic search impressions for target keywords
Funnel-wide conversion lift from A/B testing

phases.name: Pre-Launch Foundation
phases.description: Install tracking, configure automation, QA all assets, align the team, and warm sending domains. Nothing goes live until the measurement infrastructure is proven.

tasks.name: Install Google Tag Manager container
tasks.description: Deploy across sgadental.com and all landing page subdomains. Create a single GTM container with environment-specific configurations.
tasks.kpi: Container firing on all pages

tasks.name: Configure GA4 property
tasks.description: Set up conversion events: assessment_start, assessment_complete, discovery_call_booked, guide_download, consultation_booked, application_submitted. Enable enhanced measurement.
tasks.kpi: All 6 conversion events firing correctly

tasks.name: Set up UTM convention
tasks.description: Standard format: utm_source / utm_medium / utm_campaign / utm_content / utm_term. Document in shared spreadsheet. All team members trained on convention before any links go live.
tasks.kpi: 100% UTM compliance across all launched links

tasks.name: Install Meta Pixel
tasks.description: Deploy across all pages. Configure standard events (Lead, CompleteRegistration, Schedule) and custom events matching GA4 conversion events. Verify with Meta Pixel Helper.
tasks.kpi: Pixel Helper shows green on all pages

tasks.name: Install LinkedIn Insight Tag
tasks.description: Deploy across all pages. Configure conversion tracking for Lead Gen Form completions and landing page conversions.
tasks.kpi: Tag verified in LinkedIn Campaign Manager

tasks.name: Configure Google Ads conversion tracking
tasks.description: Set up conversion actions: assessment_complete, discovery_call_booked (offline import from CRM), consultation_booked. Enable Enhanced Conversions.
deliverables: Offline import from CRM set up
tasks.kpi: All conversion actions verified in Google Ads

tasks.name: Set up heatmapping
tasks.description: Deploy Hotjar or Microsoft Clarity on all landing pages. Configure recording for assessment flow, pricing page, and webinar registration page.
deliverables: Session recording configured for key pages
tasks.kpi: Heatmap data collecting on all 5 landing pages

tasks.name: Configure email sending domain
tasks.description: Authenticate SPF, DKIM, and DMARC for the sending domain. Warm the domain with low-volume sends for 7-10 days before full deployment.
tasks.kpi: Email authentication passes all checks

tasks.name: Build tag architecture
tasks.description: Implement the full tag taxonomy from the Funnel Architecture document (pa_assessment_complete, pa_tier_strong, dr_guide_download, pt_assessment_complete, sp_guide_download, etc.).
tasks.kpi: 17 tags from funnel architecture implemented

tasks.name: Build automation triggers
tasks.description: Configure conditional logic: tag-based sequence entry, 3+ opens triggering engagement sequences, cross-funnel routing rules.
tasks.kpi: All 6 conditional logic rules from funnel architecture operational

tasks.name: Load email sequences
tasks.description: Import all 5 email sequences: PA-Indoctrination (5 emails), PA-Engagement (8 emails), DR-Nurture (4 emails), PT-Implant Nurture (6 emails), SP-Indoctrination (4 emails). QA every link, merge tag, and conditional block.
tasks.kpi: 27 emails loaded and QA'd across 5 sequences

tasks.name: Configure re-engagement triggers
tasks.description: Set cold_60d and cold_90d tags to fire automatically based on email engagement data. Build re-engagement sequence (3 emails).
tasks.kpi: Tags auto-firing based on engagement inactivity

tasks.name: Test email deliverability
tasks.description: Send test emails to Litmus or Email on Acid. Verify rendering across Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail (desktop and mobile). Fix any formatting issues before launch.
tasks.kpi: Zero rendering issues in Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail

tasks.name: Configure CRM lead routing
tasks.description: Assessment completions with score > 80 route to BD team within 48 hours. Score < 40 routes to educational content track. All leads tagged by source and funnel.
tasks.kpi: Leads routed within SLA: same-day for score > 80, 48 hours for score 50-79

tasks.name: Build BD team dashboard
tasks.description: Real-time view of: new assessment completions, discovery calls booked, lead score distribution, lead source attribution.
tasks.kpi: Dashboard live with 4 core metrics visible

tasks.name: Brief BD team on messaging
tasks.description: Walk through the positioning document, objection-handling language, and the messaging hierarchy. BD team must speak the same language as the marketing assets.
tasks.kpi: BD team can articulate positioning and handle top 5 objections

tasks.name: Set up call booking system
tasks.description: Configure Calendly or HubSpot meeting links for discovery calls. Embed in email CTAs and landing page CTAs. Set up confirmation and reminder emails.
deliverables: Links embedded in emails and landing pages
tasks.kpi: Booking flow tested end-to-end

tasks.name: Configure lead-to-opportunity handoff
tasks.description: Define MQL vs SQL criteria. MQL: completed assessment + opened 3+ emails OR clicked CTA 3+ times. SQL: booked discovery call.
tasks.kpi: MQL-to-SQL conversion tracking operational

tasks.name: QA main landing page
tasks.description: Test all links, form submissions, mobile responsiveness, page load speed (<3 seconds), and CTA button tracking. Verify assessment embed loads correctly.
tasks.kpi: Page load < 3 seconds, all forms functional, assessment embed verified

tasks.name: QA associate landing page
tasks.description: Same QA protocol. Verify career guide download delivery, application links, and job listing integration.
tasks.kpi: Full QA pass with zero blocking issues

tasks.name: QA patient landing page
tasks.description: Same QA protocol. Verify Smile Assessment embed, consultation booking integration, Dr. Olson video embeds, and financing calculator if applicable.
tasks.kpi: Full QA pass with zero blocking issues

tasks.name: QA pricing page
tasks.description: Verify tier section functionality, CTA tracking at each tier level, and value equation table rendering on mobile.
tasks.kpi: Full QA pass with zero blocking issues

tasks.name: QA competitor comparison page
tasks.description: Verify all competitor data is current and accurate. Check that no competitor claims could trigger legal issues.
tasks.kpi: Legal sign-off on all competitor claims

tasks.name: Prepare lead magnet delivery
tasks.description: Test Practice Partnership Assessment delivery flow: completion > email capture > instant delivery email > results page. Verify scoring logic across all 3 tiers.
deliverables: Scoring logic verified for all 3 tiers
tasks.kpi: End-to-end delivery working for Strong Position, Growth Opportunity, and Foundation Building tiers

tasks.name: Launch kickoff meeting
tasks.description: All stakeholders (marketing, BD, practice ops, leadership) aligned on launch timeline, success metrics, and escalation paths.
tasks.kpi: All stakeholders aligned and confirmed

tasks.name: Distribute sales enablement kit
tasks.description: Battle cards, elevator pitches, FAQ document, and one-pager to all BD team members and practice managers.
tasks.kpi: All BD team members and practice managers confirmed receipt

tasks.name: Brief practice-level teams
tasks.description: Inform office managers at all practices about the marketing launch. Provide talking points for any patient or staff questions about the SGA brand.
tasks.kpi: All office managers briefed

tasks.name: Align leadership on social posting
tasks.description: Confirm Lamonte Jensen, Dr. Ellingson, Pete Wong, and Dr. Olson are briefed on the LinkedIn thought leadership cadence and have approved their first 2 weeks of content.
tasks.kpi: All 4 leaders confirmed and content approved

tasks.name: Begin email domain warming
tasks.description: Send 50-100 emails per day to known contacts (existing SGA/Gen4/MODIS partner communication lists with confirmed opt-in). Gradually increase volume by 25% daily.
tasks.kpi: Bounce rate < 2%, spam complaint rate < 0.1%

tasks.name: Set up ad accounts
tasks.description: Create campaigns in draft/paused state across Google Ads, LinkedIn Campaign Manager, Meta Business Suite. Upload all creative assets. Configure audience targeting.
tasks.kpi: All campaigns ready to activate with one click

tasks.name: Build retargeting audiences
tasks.description: Create website visitor audiences (30-day, 90-day, 180-day) on Meta and Google. Create engagement audiences from existing YouTube viewers and LinkedIn page visitors.
tasks.kpi: All retargeting audiences active and populating

tasks.name: Create lookalike audiences
tasks.description: Build 1% lookalike audiences from existing SGA/Gen4/MODIS patient lists (patient funnel) and from dentist contact lists (practice acquisition funnel). Requires uploading hashed email lists to Meta and Google.
tasks.kpi: Lookalike audiences created and ready for targeting

tasks.name: Schedule LinkedIn posts for Weeks 3-4
tasks.description: Queue 3-4 posts per week for each leader (Jensen, Ellingson, Olson, Wong) in a scheduling tool. Content drawn from the LinkedIn calendar asset.
deliverables: LinkedIn posts scheduled for all 4 leaders, Weeks 3-4
tasks.kpi: 12-16 posts per leader queued for 2-week window

tasks.name: Schedule Facebook/Instagram posts for Weeks 3-4
tasks.description: Queue 5-7 posts per week for the central SGA brand pages. Content drawn from the Facebook/Instagram calendar asset.
tasks.kpi: Content queued and approved

tasks.name: Prepare YouTube video backlog
tasks.description: If Dr. Olson has pre-recorded content, edit and queue first 4 videos per the YouTube calendar. If not, schedule recording sessions for Week 3.
deliverables: First 4 videos edited and queued (or recording sessions scheduled)
tasks.kpi: 4 videos ready for Week 5 publication

tasks.name: Build content kit for local practices
tasks.description: Create the first monthly content kit with 12-15 ready-to-post assets (graphics, captions, video clips) that local office managers can customize and post on their practice pages.
tasks.kpi: Kit delivered to all office managers

tasks.name: Stage SEO pillar page and first blog posts
tasks.description: Finalize 'How to Sell Your Dental Practice' pillar page. Internal link structure connecting to supporting blog posts. Schema markup implemented. Write and schedule first 4 blog posts targeting highest-opportunity keywords.
tasks.kpi: All SEO content staged and ready for publication

tasks.name: End-to-end funnel test (PA)
tasks.description: One team member completes the entire PA funnel: clicks ad > lands on page > starts assessment > completes assessment > receives email > opens/clicks through 3 emails > books discovery call. Verify every step fires correctly in analytics, CRM, and email platform.
tasks.kpi: 100% of steps fire correctly across GA4, Meta, LinkedIn, and CRM

tasks.name: End-to-end funnel test (PT)
tasks.description: Same for patient funnel: clicks ad > lands on page > starts Smile Assessment > completes > receives email > booking CTA works.
tasks.kpi: 100% of steps fire correctly

tasks.name: End-to-end funnel test (DR)
tasks.description: Same for recruitment funnel: career page > guide download > email sequence > application link.
tasks.kpi: 100% of steps fire correctly

tasks.name: Verify all conversion tracking
tasks.description: Cross-reference GA4 events, Meta Pixel events, LinkedIn Insight Tag events, and CRM data. All systems must show the same conversion count (within 5% margin for platform attribution differences).
tasks.kpi: All platforms within 5% margin of each other

tasks.name: Go/No-Go decision
tasks.description: Marketing Lead confirms all systems are operational. Any unresolved issues get documented with a workaround plan. Launch proceeds only if core tracking and automation are verified.
deliverables: Workaround plans for any unresolved issues
tasks.kpi: All core systems verified and approved for launch

phases.name: Launch Week
phases.description: Channels activate in a deliberate order: organic before paid, owned before rented, high-intent before awareness. Monday through Friday controlled deployment sequence.

tasks.name: Publish all landing pages
tasks.description: Monday 9:00 AM: Remove staging gate on main landing page, associate landing page, patient landing page, pricing page. Verify all tracking fires on first real pageview.
tasks.kpi: All tracking verified on first real pageview

tasks.name: Publish SEO pillar page + first 2 blog posts
tasks.description: Monday 9:00 AM: Publish pillar page and first 2 blog posts. Submit sitemap to Google Search Console. Request indexing for priority pages.
tasks.kpi: Pages indexed within 48 hours

tasks.name: Activate email sequences
tasks.description: Monday 10:00 AM: Activate PA-Indoctrination, DR-Nurture, and PT-Implant Nurture email sequences. Confirm automation triggers are armed. Send test to internal address to verify.
tasks.kpi: Automation triggers firing correctly on first real lead

tasks.name: Send internal launch announcement
tasks.description: Monday 11:00 AM: Notify all SGA partners and office managers that the marketing engine is live. Include talking points and FAQ.
tasks.kpi: All partners and office managers notified

tasks.name: Post first LinkedIn thought leadership piece
tasks.description: Monday 12:00 PM: Lamonte Jensen publishes the '7 out of 10 dentists regret their DSO sale' perspective piece. No paid amplification yet -- let it gain organic traction.
tasks.kpi: Organic engagement rate (likes, comments, shares)

tasks.name: Post first Facebook/Instagram content
tasks.description: Monday 2:00 PM: Dr. Olson patient transformation content on central SGA pages. Warm the page with organic engagement.
tasks.kpi: Organic engagement on first post

tasks.name: Activate Google Search campaigns
tasks.description: Tuesday 8:00 AM: Activate Google Search campaigns for PA funnel ('sell dental practice,' 'dental practice valuation,' 'DSO partnership') and PT funnel ('dental implants cost,' 'full arch dental implants [city],' 'All-on-4 near me'). Start at 50% of planned daily budget.
deliverables: PA search campaigns live at 50% budget
PT search campaigns live at 50% budget
tasks.kpi: CTR, CPC, conversion tracking verified

tasks.name: Activate Google LSAs for top 10 practices
tasks.description: Tuesday 8:00 AM: Local Services Ads for highest-priority practice locations. Verify phone tracking numbers are routed correctly.
tasks.kpi: Calls routing to correct practices

tasks.name: LinkedIn and Meta organic posts Day 2
tasks.description: Tuesday: Dr. Ellingson publishes on clinical autonomy and the 'last great profession' theme (LinkedIn 10:00 AM). Behind-the-scenes content from an SGA practice (Facebook/Instagram 12:00 PM).
tasks.kpi: Organic engagement metrics

tasks.name: Monitor Day 1-2 analytics
tasks.description: Tuesday 3:00 PM: Verify conversion tracking is firing. Check for any broken links, form errors, or delivery failures. Fix immediately.
tasks.kpi: Zero broken links, zero form errors, all tracking verified

tasks.name: Activate LinkedIn Thought Leader Ads
tasks.description: Wednesday 8:00 AM: Amplify Jensen's Monday post as a Thought Leader Ad. Target: practice owners, dental group executives, 10+ years experience, in target geographies. Start at 50% budget.
deliverables: LinkedIn Thought Leader Ads live at 50% budget
tasks.kpi: CTR, engagement rate, cost per engagement

tasks.name: Activate LinkedIn Sponsored Jobs
tasks.description: Wednesday 8:00 AM: Promote highest-priority open positions with differentiated copy (mentorship, equity pathway, Pikos Institute access).
tasks.kpi: Applications per sponsored job

tasks.name: Distribute content kit to local practices
tasks.description: Wednesday 2:00 PM: First weekly content kit goes to office managers with posting instructions.
deliverables: Content kit #1 distributed to all office managers
tasks.kpi: Distribution confirmed to all practices

tasks.name: Activate Facebook/Instagram ads
tasks.description: Thursday 8:00 AM: Launch PA funnel ads ('Sunday Night' and 'Horror Stories' variations for Test AD-1) and PT funnel ads ('Life's Moments' and 'Steak Moment' creative). Target practice owners via interest + behavior targeting and adults 35-65 within 15-mile radius of top MODIS practices. Start at 50% budget.
tasks.kpi: CTR, CPC, first conversions tracked

tasks.name: Review first 48 hours of Google Ads data
tasks.description: Thursday 3:00 PM: Check CTR, CPC, conversion tracking. Pause any keywords with CPC above 2x target. Add negative keywords for irrelevant queries.
tasks.kpi: CPC within target range for PA and PT funnels

tasks.name: Increase all paid budgets to 75%
tasks.description: Friday 8:00 AM: If Days 2-4 show acceptable CPC and no tracking issues, scale to 75% of planned budget across all paid channels.
deliverables: Budget scaled to 75% across Google, LinkedIn, Meta
tasks.kpi: CPL within target after budget increase

tasks.name: Publish blog posts #3 and #4
tasks.description: Friday 9:00 AM: Publish 'What Is a 4th Generation DSO' and 'DSO Dentist Salary Guide.' Promote via LinkedIn and email.
tasks.kpi: Organic traffic to blog posts within first 48 hours

tasks.name: Launch PR/outreach wave
tasks.description: Friday 10:00 AM: Send press release to Dental Economics, Group Dentistry Now, Becker's Dental Review. Position: SGA Dental Partners unifies Gen4 and MODIS under the 'partnership that makes dentists better' positioning.
deliverables: Press release sent to 3 trade publications
tasks.kpi: Publication pickup rate

tasks.name: Distribute first weekly performance snapshot
tasks.description: Friday 3:00 PM: Impressions, clicks, conversions, CPL by channel. Share with leadership and BD team.
tasks.kpi: Report distributed to all stakeholders

tasks.name: Weekend monitoring and engagement
tasks.description: Monitor ad spend and pacing, respond to all social comments within 12 hours, review email delivery metrics, analyze early engagement signals.
tasks.kpi: No overspend, bounce rate < 2%, spam complaints < 0.1%

tasks.name: Begin A/B tests: LP-1, LP-2, AD-1, EM-1
tasks.description: Launch week tests: LP-1 (Headline Framing: Empathy vs. Fear-Stat), LP-2 (CTA Button Copy: Professional vs. Peer-Framed), AD-1 (Hook Type: Sunday Night vs. Horror Stories), EM-1 (Subject Line: Curiosity vs. Direct).
tasks.kpi: Tests running with traffic allocated

phases.name: Post-Launch Optimization
phases.description: First optimization cycle, YouTube and TikTok launch, scorecard funnel goes live, Phase 1 A/B test checkpoint.

tasks.name: Scale to 100% budget on qualifying channels
tasks.description: Week 4: Scale to 100% budget on channels meeting CPL targets. Pause/adjust underperformers. New creative variations rotated in.
deliverables: Budget scaled to 100% on qualifying channels
tasks.kpi: CPL within target at full budget

tasks.name: Begin Phase 1 B-wave A/B tests
tasks.description: Week 4: Launch LP-6 (Exit Intent Popup), AD-2 (CTA Type: Direct vs. Transitional), LP-7 (Specific Numbers in Social Proof Bar).
deliverables: 3 additional A/B tests configured and live
tasks.kpi: Tests running with sufficient traffic

tasks.name: Publish blog posts #5-6
tasks.description: Week 4: Continue SEO keyword map execution. Second LinkedIn content wave.
tasks.kpi: Organic traffic growth week-over-week

tasks.name: Analyze first assessment completion data
tasks.description: Week 4: Review Practice Partnership Assessment tier distribution and BD follow-up effectiveness.
tasks.kpi: Assessment completion rate, tier distribution balance, BD response time within SLA

tasks.name: Launch YouTube content series
tasks.description: Week 5: First 4 videos from YouTube calendar published. Description links optimized with YourSmileDestination.com and Implant Cost Guide PDF. Pinned comments added.
tasks.kpi: View count, watch time, description link clicks

tasks.name: Launch TikTok account
tasks.description: Week 5: TikTok account created. First 10 videos posted (cross-posted from YouTube Shorts, re-exported without watermark).
tasks.kpi: View count, follower growth, engagement rate

tasks.name: Launch LinkedIn employee advocacy pilot
tasks.description: Week 5: 10-15 partners begin sharing content through advocacy library.
tasks.kpi: Partner participation rate, reshare engagement

tasks.name: Begin Phase 1 C-wave A/B tests
tasks.description: Week 5: Launch AD-5 (Emotional vs. Rational Angle, PT funnel), QS-3 (Follow-Up Timing: Immediate vs. 30-min).
deliverables: 2 additional A/B tests configured and live
tasks.kpi: Tests running with sufficient traffic

tasks.name: Partnership Readiness Scorecard final QA
tasks.description: Week 5: Test all 15 questions, scoring logic across all 3 tiers (Strong Position 80-100, Growth Opportunity 50-79, Foundation Building 0-49), results page rendering, and lead capture form.
deliverables: Scoring logic verified for all 3 tiers
tasks.kpi: 100% of scoring paths produce correct tier assignment

tasks.name: Scorecard funnel goes live
tasks.description: Week 6 Monday: Partnership Readiness Scorecard published at sgadental.com/partnership-assessment. Linked from main landing page as secondary CTA. Scorecard completions feed into PA-Indoctrination sequence with tier-specific messaging. Score > 80 triggers BD priority alert.
tasks.kpi: Completion rate > 70%, lead capture rate > 60% of completers

tasks.name: Scorecard promotion plan activated
tasks.description: Week 6 Wednesday: LinkedIn organic posts from leaders, Facebook ads with micro-commitment CTA, Google Search ads with 'dental practice valuation' keywords pointing to scorecard.
tasks.kpi: Scorecard completions per week

tasks.name: Activate SP-Indoctrination email sequence
tasks.description: Week 6: Specialist funnel email sequence activated. Specialist's Guide white paper delivery tested.
tasks.kpi: Sequence open rate > 35%

tasks.name: Phase 1 A/B test checkpoint
tasks.description: Week 6: Review LP-1, LP-2, AD-1 results. Declare winners and implement. Calculate cumulative lift. Expected: 15-25% improvement in landing page conversion rate, 20-30% improvement in ad CPL.
tasks.kpi: 15-25% LP conversion improvement, 20-30% CPL improvement

phases.name: Scale and Sustain
phases.description: Webinar launch, chatbot deployment, competitor pages roll-out, story emails, second webinar, 90-day review. Phase 2 and Phase 3 A/B tests run concurrently.

tasks.name: Build webinar registration page
tasks.description: Week 7: Registration page with title per webinar strategy (Option A or B based on WB-1 test allocation), 7-bullet content description, speaker bios (Jensen + Ellingson), and Lead Gen Form integration.
tasks.kpi: Registration page conversion rate

tasks.name: Build pre-webinar email sequence
tasks.description: Week 7: 5-email sequence: Confirmation (Day 0), 'What to prepare' (Day -7), 'Tomorrow' reminder (Day -1), 'Starting in 1 hour' (Day 0, -60 min), Post-webinar replay (Day 0, +2 hours).
tasks.kpi: Reminder email open rates > 60%

tasks.name: Deploy chatbot on main and patient landing pages
tasks.description: Week 7 Monday: Bottom-right widget with 30-second delay trigger. Practice owner path leads to assessment/discovery call booking, patient path leads to nearest practice finder/consultation booking, career path leads to open positions/guide download.
tasks.kpi: Engagement rate (% of visitors who interact), routing accuracy

tasks.name: Launch webinar registration ads
tasks.description: Week 7 Thursday: LinkedIn ads targeting practice owners and specialists. Meta ads targeting warm audiences (website visitors, email subscribers). Target: 75+ registrations.
tasks.kpi: 75+ registrations for first webinar

tasks.name: Publish first competitor comparison page
tasks.description: Week 7: 'SGA vs. Heartland Dental' -- highest search volume competitor comparison. Legal review completed.
deliverables: SGA vs. Heartland Dental page published
tasks.kpi: Organic ranking for 'heartland dental reviews' and 'heartland dental partnership'

tasks.name: Begin Phase 2 A/B tests
tasks.description: Week 7: Launch LP-3 (Social Proof Format), LP-5 (Section Order), AD-3 (Creative Format: Single Image vs. Carousel), EM-2 (Send Time: 6:30 AM vs. 7:30 PM).
deliverables: 4 Phase 2 A/B tests configured and live
tasks.kpi: Tests running with sufficient traffic allocation

tasks.name: Host first live webinar
tasks.description: Week 8 Thursday 12 PM ET: 'The Dental Partnership Decision' -- Jensen and Ellingson present the 7-question framework. 60 minutes teaching + 15 minutes Q&A + 10 minutes pitch.
tasks.kpi: 75+ registrations, 35%+ attendance rate

tasks.name: Activate post-webinar replay sequence
tasks.description: Week 8-9: 4-email post-webinar sequence: replay link (Day 0), social proof from attendees (Day 2), urgency on discovery call slots (Day 5), final CTA (Day 7).
tasks.kpi: Replay view rate, discovery call bookings from webinar attendees

tasks.name: Activate story email sequences
tasks.description: Week 8: Soap Opera Sequence (5 emails) activated for PA leads who completed indoctrination but haven't booked discovery call. ISM Broadcast Sequence activated for active PA/SP email lists.
tasks.kpi: Story email engagement rates vs. standard sequence benchmarks

tasks.name: Begin Phase 2 B-wave A/B tests
tasks.description: Week 8: Launch QS-1 (Question Order), QS-2 (Results Gating), PP-1 (Pricing Headline), WB-1 (Webinar Title -- first data point).
tasks.kpi: Tests running with sufficient sample size

tasks.name: Repurpose webinar content
tasks.description: Week 9: Edit recording into 5-7 short clips for LinkedIn and YouTube. Best Q&A moments become standalone content pieces. Slides become downloadable PDF lead magnet.
tasks.kpi: Clip view counts, PDF download count

tasks.name: Publish competitor pages wave 2
tasks.description: Week 9: 'SGA vs. MB2 Dental' and 'SGA vs. Pacific Dental Services' published. Promoted via targeted Google Search ads on competitor brand keywords.
deliverables: SGA vs. MB2 Dental page published
Google Search ads on competitor keywords live
tasks.kpi: Organic ranking for competitor brand keywords

tasks.name: Deploy new ad creative wave
tasks.description: Week 9: Rotate in 3-4 fresh creative concepts per channel to combat creative fatigue. Include testimonial-based ads, data-led ads, and transformation story ads.
deliverables: 3-4 new creative concepts per channel deployed
tasks.kpi: CTR improvement vs. fatigued creative

tasks.name: Begin Phase 2 C-wave A/B tests
tasks.description: Week 9: Launch AD-4 (Thought Leader vs. Company Page), EM-3 (Sender Name). Phase 2 mid-point check.
tasks.kpi: Tests running with sufficient traffic

tasks.name: Deploy chatbot on associate and pricing pages
tasks.description: Week 7 (associate LP) and Week 9 (pricing page): Expand chatbot deployment with specialized flow for deal-structure questions on pricing page.
deliverables: Chatbot live on pricing page with specialized flow
tasks.kpi: Chatbot engagement rate, conversion attribution from chatbot

tasks.name: Host second live webinar
tasks.description: Week 10: Apply WB-1 learnings (alternate title if data supports). Expand audience targeting to include cold traffic. Target: 100+ registrations.
tasks.kpi: 100+ registrations, improved conversion rate vs. first webinar

tasks.name: Publish competitor pages wave 3
tasks.description: Week 10: 'SGA vs. Aspen Dental' and 'SGA vs. SALT Dental Partners' published.
deliverables: SGA vs. Aspen Dental page published
SGA vs. SALT Dental Partners page published
tasks.kpi: Organic ranking for competitor brand keywords

tasks.name: YouTube midpoint review
tasks.description: Week 10: 10-12 videos published. Analyze view counts, watch time, description link clicks, and email captures from the Implant Cost Guide. Adjust content mix based on performance.
tasks.kpi: View count, watch time, description link click-through rate

tasks.name: Phase 2 A/B test checkpoint
tasks.description: Week 10: Review Phase 2 results. Implement winners for LP-3, LP-5, AD-3. Expected: 15-30% additional improvement on Phase 1 gains.
tasks.kpi: 15-30% additional improvement on Phase 1 gains

tasks.name: Publish competitor pages wave 4
tasks.description: Week 11: 'SGA Alternative for Dentists' (catch-all comparison) and 'Best DSO Partnerships 2026' (roundup/authority page). Full competitor page SEO suite now complete.
tasks.kpi: Organic traffic to competitor comparison pages

tasks.name: Publish first formal case studies
tasks.description: Week 11: Dr. Cavendish story (Gen4 transformation) and a MODIS partner story. Distributed to BD team, posted on website, promoted via LinkedIn.
tasks.kpi: Case study page views, BD team usage rate

tasks.name: Third ad creative rotation
tasks.description: Week 11: Budget reallocation based on 8 weeks of data. Shift spend to highest-performing channels and creative concepts.
tasks.kpi: CPL improvement after reallocation

tasks.name: Begin Phase 3 A/B tests
tasks.description: Week 11-12: Launch LP-8 (Video Testimonial Compilation), LP-4 (Problem Section Length), WB-2 (Registration Bullets), WB-3 (Pitch Timing), EM-4 (Social Proof Email Format), EM-5 (Sequence Length). These extend beyond 90-day window.
tasks.kpi: Tests initiated and tracking data

tasks.name: Full 90-day performance review
tasks.description: Week 12: Compile all metrics against launch targets. Calculate A/B test cumulative lift. Identify top 3 performing channels, top 3 underperformers, and root causes.
tasks.kpi: All 10 success metrics evaluated against targets

tasks.name: Build Month 4-6 plan
tasks.description: Week 12: Adjust budget allocation, content strategy, and funnel architecture based on real performance data from 90 days of operation.
tasks.kpi: Plan approved by leadership

tasks.name: Pipeline review with BD team
tasks.description: Week 12: Total leads generated, MQL > SQL conversion rate, discovery calls booked, site visits, LOIs in progress. Calculate marketing-attributed pipeline value.
tasks.kpi: 30-45 discovery calls booked, pipeline value documented

tasks.name: Community growth assessment
tasks.description: Week 12: Measure LinkedIn combined followers, YouTube subscribers, Facebook/Instagram followers, TikTok followers against 90-day targets.
tasks.kpi: +5,000 combined social following growth

tasks.name: Evaluate evergreen webinar conversion
tasks.description: Week 12: Decide whether to convert the best-performing webinar into an on-demand evergreen asset (automated webinar funnel) based on attendance-to-conversion data.
tasks.kpi: Conversion rate from live webinar attendees to discovery calls

monday.activity: Weekly planning: review previous week's metrics, prioritize this week's content and tests, address any issues

tuesday.activity: Content production: LinkedIn posts drafted, social content created, blog posts written or edited

wednesday.activity: Optimization: A/B test check-ins, ad creative refresh, email sequence performance review

thursday.activity: Distribution: schedule content, deploy new ad creative, activate new automation rules

friday.activity: Reporting: weekly performance snapshot distributed to leadership and BD team; document learnings

paidScalingRules.threshold: Channel delivers CPL below target for 2 consecutive weeks with 30+ conversions
paidScalingRules.action: Increase budget by 25%. Monitor CPL for 1 week. If CPL holds, increase another 25%.

paidScalingRules.threshold: Channel delivers CPL within 10% of target
paidScalingRules.action: Maintain current budget. Focus on creative testing to improve efficiency.

paidScalingRules.threshold: Channel delivers CPL above target for 2 consecutive weeks
paidScalingRules.action: Reduce budget by 25%. Diagnose: is it creative fatigue, audience exhaustion, or landing page issues? Fix the root cause before re-scaling.

paidScalingRules.threshold: Channel delivers CPL more than 2x target for 3 consecutive weeks with no improvement trend
paidScalingRules.action: Pause the channel. Redirect budget to top performers. Diagnose and rebuild before reactivating.

paidScalingRules.threshold: New channel or new creative concept
paidScalingRules.action: Allocate 10-15% of total monthly budget to testing. Minimum 2-week test duration. Evaluate against same CPL targets.

tests.name: Hook Type (Sunday Night vs. Horror Stories)
Specific Numbers in Social Proof Bar

channels.rationale: Highest-intent channel. Captures existing demand for 'sell dental practice,' 'dental practice valuation,' 'dental implants [city].' Fastest path to qualified leads.

channels.channel: LinkedIn Ads (Thought Leader + Sponsored Jobs + InMail)
channels.rationale: Primary B2B channel for practice acquisition and specialist recruitment. Thought Leader Ads for awareness, Lead Gen Forms for conversion, Sponsored Jobs for recruitment.
Patient acquisition (implant vertical) and practice owner awareness. Before/after transformation content performs exceptionally on Meta. Also used for webinar registration and scorecard promotion.
YouTube video production, blog writing, graphic design, social content creation. The content pyramid produces 25-35 pieces per production day -- high ROI on production investment.
Email platform subscription, deliverability tools, A/B testing tools. Small cost, massive leverage -- email sequences do the selling 24/7.
Technical SEO fixes, schema markup implementation, link building outreach, content optimization tools. Investment in organic compounds over time.
Heatmapping (Hotjar/Clarity), A/B testing platform, chatbot platform, quiz/scorecard tool, analytics tools.
Trade publication outreach, byline article placement, conference sponsorship deposits for upcoming events. Seed investment for 6-12 month authority building.

phaseAdjustments.reason: Infrastructure setup, domain warming. No paid traffic yet.
Controlled ignition. Ads start at 50% budget, scale to 75% by Friday.
Full activation. All channels running. Testing begins.
Webinar promotion and scorecard launch require additional paid support. Draw from test reserve.
Shift 10-20% from underperforming channels to top performers based on 8 weeks of data.

v2AssetTimeline.dependencies: Video production schedule confirmed, Dr. Olson availability
YouTube channel optimized, first 4 videos published
Scoring logic validated, results pages built, follow-up emails loaded
Registration page built, email sequences loaded
PA-Indoctrination running 4+ weeks, baseline performance established
Active subscriber list of 200+ in PA/SP funnels

technical.risk: Email deliverability issues (spam filtering, low inbox placement)
technical.mitigation: Domain warming protocol in Week 2. SPF/DKIM/DMARC authentication. Gradual volume increase. Clean list hygiene.
technical.contingency: If bounce rate exceeds 2% or spam complaints exceed 0.1%, immediately pause all sends. Investigate domain reputation. Consider switching sending subdomain.

technical.risk: Tracking pixel failures (GTM misconfiguration, conversion events not firing)
technical.mitigation: End-to-end funnel tests in Week 2 (Day 9-10). Cross-reference GA4, Meta, LinkedIn, and CRM data before launch.
technical.contingency: If discovered post-launch, pause paid spend on affected channels until tracking is verified. Use manual UTM-based tracking as a fallback.

technical.risk: Landing page downtime or slow load times
technical.mitigation: Staging environment tested under load. CDN configured. Mobile performance verified (<3 second load time).
technical.contingency: Maintain a static backup page with core messaging and a contact form. Redirect traffic to backup if primary page goes down during critical periods.

technical.risk: CRM integration breaks (leads not routing to BD team)
technical.mitigation: Integration tested in Week 1. Backup notification: email alert to BD team on every assessment completion, independent of CRM routing.
technical.contingency: Manual lead monitoring via email platform dashboard. Daily check of assessment completions vs. CRM entries.

market.risk: Competitor launches counter-campaign during SGA launch window
market.mitigation: Monitor competitor activity weekly. Google Alerts for competitor brand names + 'partnership' / 'new' / 'launch.'
market.contingency: If a competitor launches a major campaign, accelerate the competitor comparison page for that specific competitor. Increase ad spend on brand-defense keywords.

market.risk: Negative press or social media criticism about DSOs in general
market.mitigation: The positioning already addresses DSO skepticism head-on ('7 out of 10 regret'). The messaging is built to withstand anti-DSO sentiment.
market.contingency: If specific criticism targets SGA, respond with named partner testimonials and verifiable data points. Use the Sage archetype: 'Here are the facts. Here are the names. Call them yourself.'

market.risk: Practice owner market shifts (recession fears, practice value declines)
market.mitigation: Monitor dental market publications (Dental Economics, ADA Health Policy Institute reports). Adjust messaging to emphasize stability and risk reduction.
market.contingency: Shift messaging from 'growth opportunity' to 'protection and stability.' Emphasize Thurston Group's 38-year track record through multiple economic cycles.

operational.risk: Content production bottleneck (Dr. Olson unavailable for video, leadership too busy for LinkedIn)
operational.mitigation: Pre-record content buffer: 2 weeks of YouTube content recorded in advance. LinkedIn ghostwriting support for all 4 leaders. Pre-approved content library.
operational.contingency: If Dr. Olson is unavailable, pivot to repurposing existing 200+ YouTube video library. Extract new Shorts and Reels from archival content.

operational.risk: BD team overwhelmed by lead volume (unable to follow up within 48 hours)
operational.mitigation: Set realistic lead volume expectations. Establish priority triage: Score > 80 gets same-day outreach, Score 50-79 gets 48-hour outreach, Score < 50 enters automated nurture only.
operational.contingency: If lead volume exceeds BD capacity, temporarily pause paid acquisition spend on PA funnel. Focus spend on PT funnel where practice-level teams handle follow-up.

operational.risk: Brand architecture confusion (Gen4/MODIS/SGA naming creates prospect confusion)
operational.mitigation: All marketing assets use 'SGA Dental Partners' as primary brand. Gen4 and MODIS appear only as descriptive context.
operational.contingency: If confusion persists, add 'Who Is SGA?' FAQ section to every landing page. Create a short 'Our Story' video explaining the consolidation narrative.

operational.risk: A/B test results are inconclusive due to low traffic
operational.mitigation: Traffic volume feasibility checked against minimum sample sizes. Tests on low-traffic pages run for longer durations.
operational.contingency: Lower significance threshold to 90% for low-traffic tests. Consider sequential testing (4 weeks control, 4 weeks variant) instead of simultaneous split testing.

legal.risk: Partner testimonial usage without proper consent
legal.mitigation: Confirm written approval from Dr. Godat, Dr. Cavendish, Dr. Olson, Dr. Pikos, and all other named partners before any testimonial appears in marketing materials.
legal.contingency: Maintain a 'testimonial consent' tracker. Any testimonial without documented consent is removed immediately and replaced with an approved alternative.

legal.risk: Competitor comparison pages trigger legal concerns
legal.mitigation: All competitor claims factually sourced from public information. No subjective characterizations. Review language with legal before publication.
legal.contingency: If a competitor sends a cease-and-desist, immediately review the specific claim. Remove or modify any contested statement.

legal.risk: Healthcare advertising regulations (patient testimonials, before/after images)
legal.mitigation: All patient testimonials include appropriate disclaimers. Before/after images comply with Meta and Google health advertising policies. HIPAA consent for any patient-identifiable content.
legal.contingency: If a platform rejects ad creative, immediately swap to approved backup creative. Maintain a library of 3-4 approved creative variants per ad set.

legal.risk: Financial claims accuracy (Thurston $4B+ returned, 85% retention rate)
legal.mitigation: Verify all financial and statistical claims with Thurston Group legal and SGA finance team before launch. Document sources for every number used in marketing.
legal.contingency: If any claim cannot be verified, replace with a softer statement until exact figures are confirmed.

roles.responsibilities: Overall launch ownership. Strategy, timeline, budget, cross-functional coordination. Weekly reporting to leadership. Go/no-go decisions.
roles.keyDeliverables: Weekly performance snapshots, monthly funnel reviews, budget reallocation recommendations, A/B test result documentation.

roles.responsibilities: Content calendar execution. Blog writing, social content creation, LinkedIn ghostwriting, content kit production. Quality control across all written and visual assets.
roles.keyDeliverables: 2 blog posts/week, LinkedIn posts for 4 leaders, weekly content kits for local practices, social content scheduling.

roles.responsibilities: Campaign setup, optimization, and scaling across Google, LinkedIn, and Meta. Creative testing. Budget pacing. Audience management.
roles.keyDeliverables: Campaign performance reports, creative rotation schedules, audience expansion recommendations, CPL tracking by channel.

roles.responsibilities: Email platform management, CRM integration, tracking infrastructure, A/B test implementation, chatbot configuration, scorecard/quiz tool management.
roles.keyDeliverables: Email sequence deployment, automation trigger configuration, tracking QA, test setup and monitoring, lead routing verification.

roles.responsibilities: YouTube content production for Dr. Olson's channel. Filming, editing, Short/Reel extraction, cross-platform distribution. Thumbnail design.
roles.keyDeliverables: 2 long-form videos/week, 4-5 Shorts/week, cross-platform exports, video testimonial compilation for landing pages.

roles.responsibilities: Keyword strategy execution, on-page optimization, technical SEO, link building, competitor page SEO, search ranking monitoring.
roles.keyDeliverables: Blog post optimization, pillar page maintenance, competitor page publishing, schema markup, monthly ranking reports.

roles.responsibilities: Social media engagement across all platforms. Comment replies, DM management, review monitoring, user-generated content curation.
roles.keyDeliverables: Daily engagement (4-hour response time weekdays), weekly engagement reports, UGC curation for content team.

roles.responsibilities: Lead follow-up, discovery call hosting, partner relationship management. Feedback loop to marketing on lead quality.
roles.keyDeliverables: Lead follow-up within triage SLA, discovery call notes in CRM, monthly lead quality feedback to Marketing Lead.

roles.responsibilities: Communication bridge between central marketing and local practices. Content kit distribution, office manager briefing, local page management support.
roles.keyDeliverables: Monthly content kit distribution, office manager training, local practice feedback collection.

roles.responsibilities: Trade publication relationships, byline article placement, podcast booking for leadership, conference planning.
roles.keyDeliverables: 1-2 podcast appearances/month, quarterly byline articles, conference booth coordination.

meetingCadence.purpose: Quick status updates, blockers, priorities for the day

meetingCadence.attendees: Marketing Lead, Paid Media, Marketing Ops
meetingCadence.purpose: Review metrics against targets, identify issues, adjust tactics

meetingCadence.attendees: Content Lead, Video Production, SEO Lead, Marketing Lead
meetingCadence.purpose: Plan content for the week, review previous week's performance, coordinate cross-platform publishing
Lead quality feedback, pipeline review, messaging alignment, sales enablement needs
High-level metrics, budget review, strategic recommendations, escalations

optimizationCadence.detail: Ensure no campaign overspends. Check for anomalous CPC spikes. Pause underperformers.
Assessment completions, guide downloads, and form submissions routed to BD within 4 hours during business hours.
Reply to comments, DMs, and mentions within 4 hours (weekdays) / 12 hours (weekends).
Consolidated report: spend, impressions, clicks, conversions, CPL, pipeline by channel.
Identify creative fatigue (CTR decline > 20% week-over-week). Rotate in new creative from the ad asset library.
Open rates, click rates, unsubscribe rates, bounce rates per sequence. Flag any sequence with open rate below 25% for subject line review.
Evaluate running tests against minimum sample thresholds. Declare winners when statistical significance is reached. Document results.
Monitor keyword ranking movement, organic traffic trends, and index coverage. Publish next 2 blog posts per the keyword map.
End-to-end conversion analysis: awareness > lead > MQL > SQL > discovery call > site visit > LOI. Identify the weakest stage.
Shift spend from underperforming channels to overperformers. Minimum 2 weeks of data before making reallocation decisions.
Assess what content performed best. Double down on winning formats. Retire underperformers.

trackingAndAnalytics: GTM container deployed on all pages
GA4 property configured with all conversion events
Meta Pixel installed and verified (Pixel Helper green)
LinkedIn Insight Tag installed and verified
Heatmapping tool deployed on landing pages
UTM convention documented and shared with all team members

All email sequences loaded and QA'd (links, merge tags, conditional blocks)
Email rendering verified across Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail (desktop + mobile)
crmAndSales: BD team dashboard built and accessible
MQL/SQL definitions documented and communicated to BD team
Sales enablement kit distributed to all BD team members
landingPages: Main landing page QA'd (links, forms, mobile, speed)
All pages load in under 3 seconds on mobile
Form submissions route to correct CRM pipeline
paidMedia: All creative uploaded in draft/paused state
Audience targeting configured (interest, behavior, lookalike, retargeting)
Conversion tracking verified at the ad platform level
Daily budget caps set to prevent overspend
content: LinkedIn posts scheduled for Weeks 3-4 (all 4 leaders)
First 4 blog posts written and staged
internalAlignment: Leadership aligned on launch timeline and success metrics
BD team briefed on messaging and lead handling
Practice managers informed about marketing launch
Thought leadership leaders (Jensen, Ellingson, Olson, Wong) confirmed for LinkedIn posting
funnelTests: PA funnel: ad click > landing page > assessment > email > discovery call booking -- all steps verified
PT funnel: ad click > landing page > Smile Assessment > email > consultation booking -- all steps verified
DR funnel: career page > guide download > email sequence > application link -- all steps verified
